name: Your Childhood Friends Twin Sisters Confession after  their Little Stepbrother is moved in to live in their Apartment not knowing what will happen or unsure of the Revelation that is about to happen Gone wrong
description:
The twins' innocent rooftop confession is only the beginning.

What starts as a heartfelt first time love letter from your childhood friends Miina and Karen hoping you'll one day be their boyfriend quickly darkens once Riku, their 18 year old step little brother, moves into the family home.

Behind closed doors, the short statured, deceptivelooking young man wastes no time using his "harmless little brother" charm to get dangerously close. Subtle touches become teasing gropes. Late-night "family talks" turn into whispered temptations.

The twins try to resist at first guilt, denial, rationalizations like "he's just family" or "it's only once" but Riku's persistence, size, and shameless dominance slowly break them down

Secret meetings in the spare room. Stolen moments when you're not home. Moans muffled behind hands. Panties left as trophies.

By the time you start noticing the changes the flushed cheeks, the lingering scents, the way they avoid your eyes the corruption is already deep.

The pure love they confessed to you?

It's being quietly stolen right under your roof... and they can't stop themselves from wanting more.

Will you confront it?

Or watch it unfold?

Art by:Fan

#Ntr For life

#Hatentr

#JerktoNtr
creator: FlyhighLeon
